name: Reva Cortinas
title: Luminary

abilities.name: Ghost Lanterns
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may remove a friendly Pyre marker within 6" to reduce that damage by 4.

abilities.name: Into the Garden
abilities.text: When another non-peon ally is killed, place it on this crew's crew card.

abilities.name: Tear Back the Veil
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, allies within (f)3" gain a Shielded token.

actions.name: Willed Flame
actions.effects: Target gains a Burning token. An ally within 2" of the target may gain a Shielded token.

actions.name: Call on the Faithful
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Remove a Convert token from target enemy.
actions.effects: The target declares an action chosen and controlled by this model.

actions.name: Rally
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp.

triggers.name: Called to the Garden
triggers.text: Once per activation. Target gains a Flicker token. If the target has already activated this turn, it no longer counts as having activated.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Erase Their Legacy
triggers.text: Remove all enemy Scheme markers within (aura)2" of the target.

actions.name: Open the Door
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Remove a model from this crew's crew card.
actions.effects: Summon the removed model within range. Set its health to 3, +3 for each raise this action receives.

extraction_notes: The (f) symbol in 'Tear Back the Veil' appears to be a measurement indicator, likely (aura) based on context
